ingredients_text: 75% involtini primavera (verdure [cavolo bianco, carote, porri, germogli di fagioli mung, aglio, cipolle], acqua, farina di frumento, carne di pollo 10% [Svizzera], olio di semi di girasole, sale iodato, funghi Orecchie di Giuda, condimento in polvere, spezie [con senape]), salsa agrodolce 25% (zucchero, aceto di tavola, acqua, fiocchi di paprika, amido di riso, sale da cucina, amido di mais, spezie [coriandolo, anice stellato, anice, cannella, chiodi di garofano, zenzero]),
ingredients_text_de: Frühlingsrollen 75% (Gemüse [Weisskohl, Karotten, Lauch, Mungbohnensprossen, Knoblauch, Zwiebeln], Wasser, Weizenmehl, Pouletfleisch 10% [Schweiz], Sonnenblumenöl, jodiertes Kochsalz, Judasohrenpilze, Streuwürze, Gewürze [mit Senf ]), süss-saure Sauce 25% (Zucker, Tafelessig, Wasser, Paprikaflocken, Reisstärke, Kochsalz, Maisstärke, Gewürze [Koriander, Sternanis, Anis, Zimt, Nelken, Ingwer ]).
ingredients_text_debug: Rouleaux de printemps 75% (légumes [chou blanc, carottes, poireaux, germes de haricots mungo, ail, oignons], eau, farine de blé, viande de poulet 10% [Suisse], huile de tournesol, sel de cuisine iodé, champignons oreilles de Judas, condiment en poudre, épices [avec moutarde ]), sauce aigre-douce 25% (sucre, vinaigre de table, eau, flocons de paprika, amidon de riz, sel de cuisine, amidon de maïs, épices [coriandre, anis étoilé, anis, cannelle, clous de girofle, gingembre ]).
ingredients_text_en: 75% spring rolls (vegetables [white cabbage, carrots, leeks, mung bean sprouts, garlic, onions], water, wheat flour, chicken meat 10% [switzerland], sunflower oil, iodized salt, judas ears mushrooms, powdered dressing, spices [with mustard]), sweet and sour sauce 25% (sugar, table vinegar, water, paprika flakes, rice starch, table salt,  corn starch, spices [coriander, star anise, anise, cinnamon, cloves, ginger]),
